response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and distributed-systems experience, including real-time systems and high-performance databases, which aligns well with the fintech infrastructure requirements. However, his background lacks direct experience with multi-agent AI systems in production, financial risk modeling, or regulated environments. His leadership in scaling teams is also not explicitly demonstrated, though his staff roles and open-source contributions suggest potential.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed-systems expertise with real-time data handling (e.g., Dunnhumby, Optilyz roles)
Experience with event-driven architectures and microservices (GISCollective, re:cinq)
Proven ability to work across full stack and multiple languages, adapting to domain needs
concerns: No documented experience with multi-agent AI systems in production or agentic AI frameworks
Limited exposure to fintech-specific domains like credit risk, liquidity management, or regulatory compliance
Lacks clear evidence of scaling engineering teams to 10+ people or developing senior technical leadership
